meta.title: 艺术鉴赏
meta.description: Upper-intermediate art appreciation vocabulary and grammar in Chinese: composition, artistic conception, and aesthetic sense.
meta.description_ko: 중국어 중급~중상급 예술 감상 어휘와 문형: 구도, 예술적 정취, 미적 감각.

questions.prompt: 「鉴赏」是什么意思？(What does 鉴赏 mean?)

explanation.en: 「意境」(yìjìng) means "artistic conception/mood", the emotional atmosphere conveyed by a work.
explanation.ko: 「意境」(yìjìng)는 작품이 전달하는 정서적 분위기, 즉 '예술적 정취'를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「意境」是什么意思？(What does 意境 mean?)
「流派」是什么意思？(What does 流派 mean?)
「审美」是什么意思？(What does 审美 mean?)

explanation.en: 「构图」(gòutú) means "composition [of a work of art]".

questions.prompt: 「构图」是什么意思？(What does 构图 mean?)
学会___艺术作品可以提高我们的审美能力。(Learning to appreciate works of art can improve our aesthetic ability.)
这幅画的___非常深远，让人回味无穷。(This painting's artistic conception is very profound, leaving a lasting impression.)
印象派是十九世纪重要的绘画___之一。(Impressionism is one of the important painting schools of the nineteenth century.)
每个人的___不同，对同一件作品的看法也会不同。(Everyone's aesthetic sense is different, so views on the same work will also differ.)
这幅画的___十分巧妙，主体与背景相得益彰。(This painting's composition is very clever, the subject and background complement each other.)
尽管这幅画年代久远，___依然散发着独特的艺术魅力。(Although this painting is very old, it still radiates unique artistic charm.)
无论是古典艺术还是现代艺术，___有其独特的价值。(Whether classical art or modern art, both have their own unique value.)
除非亲眼欣赏原作，___很难体会到作品的真正魅力。(Unless you appreciate the original work with your own eyes, it's hard to experience the work's true charm.)
这幅画之所以珍贵，___是因为它是画家生前唯一的作品。(This painting is precious precisely because it was the artist's only work during his lifetime.)

explanation.en: 「一方面〜另一方面〜」means "on one hand 〜, on the other hand 〜".
explanation.ko: 「一方面〜另一方面〜」는 '한편으로는 ~, 다른 한편으로는 ~'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 一方面这幅画在技法上非常精湛，___方面它的主题也十分深刻。(On one hand this painting is technically superb, on the other hand its theme is also very profound.)
这位艺术家的作品___了传统与现代的元素，独具一格。(This artist's works blend traditional and modern elements, uniquely distinctive.)
这次展览___了这位画家一生的代表作品。(This exhibition showcases the representative works of this painter's lifetime.)
艺术评论家对这幅作品给予了极高的___。(Art critics gave this work extremely high praise.)
这位艺术家___了独特的绘画风格，别具一格。(This artist formed a unique painting style, distinctively original.)
这场艺术展吸引了大量___前来欣赏。(This art exhibition attracted a large number of visitors to come and appreciate it.)

explanation.en: 「的」must come between 审美 and 能力 to form the correct compound noun phrase: 审美能力 (not 能力的审美).
explanation.ko: 「的」는 '我们'과 '审美能力' 사이에 와야 하며 '审美能力'는 하나의 명사구를 이루어야 하므로 '我们的审美能力'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 学会鉴赏艺术作品可以提高我们能力的审美。(Learning to appreciate works of art can improve our aesthetic ability.) — find the error
choices: 学会鉴赏艺术作品可以提高我们的审美能力。
学会鉴赏艺术作品可以提高我们能力的审美。
学会鉴赏艺术作品可以提高审美我们的能力。
学会鉴赏艺术作品可以提高我们审美的能力。

explanation.en: 「否则」must come at the start of the second clause, before 很难: 否则很难〜 (not 很难否则〜).
explanation.ko: 「否则」는 두 번째 절의 맨 앞, '很难' 앞에 와야 하므로 '否则很难〜'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 无论是古典艺术还是现代艺术，都各有其独特的价值。(Whether classical art or modern art, both have their own unique value.) — this is correct, use another: 除非亲眼欣赏原作，很难否则体会到作品的真正魅力。(Unless you appreciate the original work with your own eyes, it's hard to experience the work's true charm.) — find the error
choices: 除非亲眼欣赏原作，否则很难体会到作品的真正魅力。
除非亲眼欣赏原作，很难否则体会到作品的真正魅力。
除非亲眼欣赏原作，否则体会到很难作品的真正魅力。
除非亲眼欣赏原作，很难体会否则到作品的真正魅力。

explanation.en: The fixed pattern requires 是因为 in that order, not 因为是.
explanation.ko: 고정 문형은 '因为是'가 아니라 '是因为' 순서여야 한다.

questions.prompt: 这幅画之所以珍贵，因为是它是画家生前唯一的作品。(This painting is precious precisely because it was the artist's only work during his lifetime.) — find the error
choices: 这幅画之所以珍贵，是因为它是画家生前唯一的作品。
这幅画之所以珍贵，因为是它是画家生前唯一的作品。
这幅画之所以珍贵，是它因为是画家生前唯一的作品。
这幅画之所以珍贵，它是因为是画家生前唯一的作品。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 学会鉴赏艺术作品可以提高我们的审美能力 ("Learning to appreciate works of art can improve our aesthetic ability").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '学会鉴赏艺术作品可以提高我们的审美能力' (예술 작품을 감상하는 법을 배우면 우리의 미적 감각을 높일 수 있다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 学会鉴赏艺术作品可以提高__________。(Learning to appreciate works of art can improve our aesthetic ability.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 除非亲眼欣赏原作，否则很难体会到作品的真正魅力 ("Unless you appreciate the original work with your own eyes, it's hard to experience the work's true charm").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '除非亲眼欣赏原作，否则很难体会到作品的真正魅力' (직접 원작을 감상하지 않는 한, 작품의 진정한 매력을 느끼기 어렵다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 除非亲眼欣赏原作，__________体会到作品的真正魅力。(Unless you appreciate the original work with your own eyes, it's hard to experience the work's true charm.)
